chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-196 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A.5891/2025 04.09.2025 Petitioner Muhammad Shabbir Ahmed present in person. ----- Urgency granted. An Application has been filed by the Petitioner on 29.06.2024 for withdrawal of the Petition which due to oversight could not be fixed for hearing. Today, Petitioner present in person states that his Application (M.A. 5110/2024) for withdrawal of the Petition may be allowed. Order accordingly. Petition stands dismissed as withdrawn along with pending Application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
